title: Find My Device - Play button
scenario: Find My Device Play button shows hearing safety warning dialog before sending tone and flashing headset lights
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
3. Tap on the Find My Device feature.
4. Tap the Play button in the Find My Device screen.
5. Observe the hearing safety warning dialog that appears.
6. Acknowledge/dismiss the hearing safety warning dialog.
8. Observe the behavior of the headset and the app.
expected: After acknowledging the warning and tapping Play again, a tone is sent to the headset, the headset lights flash (if applicable), and the app displays a "Sending tone..." message with an animated stop button.
